title: Removing power_up parameter as string in \$_DFF_PN0_ cells
body:
Hi,
Regarding #1368 , the parameter __power_up__ in all _\$_DFF_PN0__ cells was defined as string, causing _dffinit_ to receive a chain of 64 bit instead of the intended init value.
Provided test case passes with these changes:
```bash
=== pattern_gen ===

   Number of wires:                148
   Number of wire bits:            280
   Number of public wires:           9
   Number of public wire bits:      78
   Number of memories:               0
   Number of memory bits:            0
   Number of processes:              0
   Number of cells:                276
     $logic_not                      1
     dffeas                         68
     fiftyfivenm_lcell_comb        207
```
code_blocks:
